description_zh: 法拉利（Ferrari）是全球最具传奇色彩的超级跑车制造商，由恩佐·法拉利（Enzo Ferrari）于1947年在意大利马拉内罗创立。品牌的跃马标志源自第一次世界大战中意大利王牌飞行员弗朗切斯科·巴拉卡（Francesco Baracca）座机上的徽章，象征着勇气、力量与胜利。法拉利的血液中流淌着赛车基因——其前身是1929年成立的Scuderia Ferrari赛车队，至今仍是世界一级方程式锦标赛（F1）历史上最成功、最负盛名的车队，拥有最多的车队冠军和车手冠军头衔。法拉利公路跑车融合了F1赛道技术的极致性能与意大利设计的优雅美学，经典车型包括250 GTO、Testarossa、F40、Enzo Ferrari、LaFerrari等，每一款都是各自时代的性能标杆。法拉利坚持限量生产的策略，严格控制年产量以维系品牌稀缺性，同时通过严格的购买资格审核机制确保车主的专属感。作为全球品牌价值最高的汽车品牌之一，法拉利早已超越交通工具的范畴，成为速度、激情与意大利手工工艺的终极象征。

languages.en: Ferrari is the world's most legendary supercar manufacturer, founded in 1947 by Enzo Ferrari in Maranello, Italy. Its iconic prancing horse logo originates from a WWI Italian fighter pilot's insignia, symbolizing courage and victory. Rooted in racing heritage as Scuderia Ferrari (founded 1929), the brand is the most successful Formula 1 team in history with the most constructor and driver championships. Ferrari road cars merge F1-derived technology with breathtaking Italian design—masterpieces like the 250 GTO, F40, and LaFerrari define each era of automotive excellence. With strictly limited production and a curated ownership process, Ferrari cultivates exclusivity and desirability. Beyond transportation, Ferrari represents the ultimate expression of speed, passion, and Italian craftsmanship, consistently ranking as the world's most powerful automotive brand.
